name: Divine Spark
description: As a Magic action, expend a use of Channel Divinity to point your Holy Symbol at a creature within 30 feet. Roll 1d8 (2d8 at level 7, 3d8 at 13, 4d8 at 18) and add your Wisdom modifier; either restore that many Hit Points to the creature, or force a Constitution saving throw for that much Radiant damage (half on a success).
